author: Sam 1 (control lane)
method: Independent grep of production (non-test, non-barrel) importers on the integrated tree, plus each lane's requalification report. 'primary-wired' = at least one production consumer on the live ceremony path; 'foundation-only' = imported solely by the package barrel + its own tests.
honestCaveat: Pilot/effect durability is NOT primary-door durability. Every NEW durability/effect/trusted-state brick this round is FOUNDATION-ONLY — proven correct + crash-safe in isolation, but not yet imported by the primary runtime. The live effect path remains mindDoor -> localCeremonyRunner -> durableRecursion -> localCandidateStage (R37/R50), which enforces the equivalent owner-gate + kernel reference-monitor decide() before the disposable worktree. Wiring the new machine is a DEFERRED brick, out of scope for this convergence-only round.

bricks.tests: kernel-node 23/23 incl. real kill-9 + concurrent exactly-one-PREPARED (Node 20 + 22)
bricks.note: no Convex/model/Fu/memory/private-key dependency; imports only node:fs, node:path, @aukora/kernel. Primary-door contract documented (PRIMARY_DOOR_CONTRACT.md); wiring deferred.

r59_amendment.note: The historical R53 values above (productionConsumers: 0, reachability: foundation-only) were true at the R53 base and are preserved unmodified; this amendment records the exact-main re-verification per the ledger's own primary-wired definition (>=1 production consumer on the live ceremony path). trustedStateStore became PRIMARY-WIRED in R54.

bricks.note: PreparedEffect.effectId is a governed-recursion keyspace, DISAMBIGUATED (namespace comment) from @aukora/brain's journal deriveEffectId — same name, different domain, no functional collision.
PREPARED strictly precedes runGitEffect(); effect runs exactly once (proven in the foundation coordinator, not yet the primary runtime).
caller may only NAME an approved plan id; no arbitrary shell.
THIS brick is on the live ceremony path — its realpath symlink re-fence + hardening reach production.

bricks.tests: brain 228; live real convex-local-backend kill-9 + destroy/rebuild re-run
bricks.note: 10 identical writes -> one row; outage -> lossless retry; destroy+replay -> identical root. journal deriveEffectId keyspace (AUKORA-EFFECT/1), distinct from Sam 3's recursion effectId.

duplicationFindings.detail: Sam 3 governed-recursion effectId (intentId/draftHash/nonce) vs Sam 4 journal deriveEffectId (rehearsalKey/step, domain AUKORA-EFFECT/1): same name, DIFFERENT keyspace, 0 exact exported-symbol collisions (Sam 4 symbol diff: 260 exported symbols in apps/brain/src/index.ts, 0 duplicated, 0 shadowed). Disambiguated with a namespace comment; wiring round will derive Sam 3's from the canonical recursion identity.

duplicationFindings.status: shared pattern, two validators (validateSettlement vs validateEffectEvent)
duplicationFindings.detail: Convergence NOT taken (would be new shared surface, forbidden this round). Deferred.

duplicationFindings.status: 3 seams (PreparedEffectStore foundation-only, Sam 4 EffectIo, Sam 2 ConvexWorkflowStore/trustedStateStore)
duplicationFindings.detail: Recommendation for the wiring round: PreparedEffect persists via Sam 2's trusted-state contract — collapse to one canonical owner; do NOT add a 4th store.

stopConditionsChecked.semanticDuplication: NONE unresolved — effectId name-overlap deconflicted by both lanes (different packages/keyspaces, 0 symbol collisions, disambiguation comment)
stopConditionsChecked.authorityDrift: NONE — AUMLOK v2 bytes byte-identical (kernel 37/37 incl. R52 authorityEncoding golden vectors; canonicalAumlokPromotion sha256 unchanged); no authority in Convex/mind/effect modules
stopConditionsChecked.falseGreenTests: NONE — kill-9 reproduced LIVE on real Node 20.20.2 + real convex-local-backend; tests exercise real machine+adapter
stopConditionsChecked.missingPrimaryExports: NONE — R52 mindProposer exports AND all overnight exports both present in apps/brain/src/index.ts (260 symbols, 0 shadowed)
stopConditionsChecked.nonReproducibleProcessDeath: NONE — Sam 2 kill-9 on both Node versions, Sam 4 live kill-9 (pid recorded) on real backend
